semantic_description: Scans an input integer array a[0..n) without modifying it. The loop checks elements from left to right and returns 0 immediately when it finds an element whose value is not zero; if the loop finishes, it returns 1. The contract requires n >= 0, Zlength(l) == n, and IntArray::full(a, n, l), and ensures the returned value matches either all elements being zero or the existence of a nonzero element. For n == 0 the loop body is skipped and the function returns 1, satisfying the universal all-zero condition over the empty range.
